title: Preventing Groupthink
concept: Guaranteeing diverse agent perspectives through system prompt instructions and temperature variations.

exercises.prompt: What was a method mentioned in the last lesson to reach agreement among agents?
exercises.explain: Voting mechanisms help agents come to a consensus and ensure everyone's voice is heard.

cards.title: What is Groupthink?
cards.body: Groupthink happens when a group of people ignore diverse opinions to agree quickly. This can lead to bad decisions.

cards.title: Understanding Perspectives
cards.body: Diverse perspectives mean including different ideas and opinions to get a well-rounded view of a problem or decision.

cards.title: Like a Color Palette
cards.body: Imagine a painter using only one color. Their painting would be dull! Using many colors creates a vibrant art piece. Similarly, diverse ideas make better decisions.

cards.title: Example of Groupthink
cards.body: If a team only listens to the loudest voice, they might miss great ideas from quieter team members. This can lead to poor decisions.

cards.title: Myth: Groupthink is good for teamwork
cards.body: While quick agreement might seem efficient, it often stifles creativity and innovation.

cards.title: Compare Diverse vs. Groupthink
cards.body: See how diverse perspectives can lead to better outcomes than groupthink.

left.text: Multiple opinions lead to thoughtful solutions.

right.text: Rapid agreement leads to missed opportunities.

exercises.prompt: What can help prevent groupthink in AI discussions?

options.text: Only listening to the loudest agent

exercises.explain: Using diverse system prompts encourages different perspectives, helping avoid groupthink.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Increasing the temperature setting in AI discussions can encourage more diverse responses.
exercises.explain: A higher temperature setting allows for more creativity and variation in responses, promoting diversity.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: To ensure diverse perspectives, we should use different __________ in the AI prompt.
exercises.sentence: To ensure diverse perspectives, we should use different temperature variations in the AI prompt.
exercises.explain: Using different temperature variations encourages a range of ideas, preventing groupthink.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following best describes a method to avoid groupthink?

options.text: Using a singular prompt for agents to follow.
Encouraging agents to bring unique perspectives by varying settings.

exercises.explain: Varying settings encourages unique perspectives from agents, reducing the risk of groupthink.

exercises.prompt: What is the most effective way to prevent groupthink among AI agents?

options.text: Ensure all agents follow the same prompt
Vary system prompts and temperature settings to get diverse responses
Limit discussions to only one topic

exercises.explain: Varying system prompts and temperature settings encourages a range of ideas, helping avoid the pitfalls of groupthink.
